name: Valentine's Day Polyresin Iridescent Heart Table Decor - Spritz™
description:
Add a touch of charm to your home with the Valentine's Day Polyresin Iridescent Heart Table Decor by Spritz™. This lovely piece, crafted from durable polyresin, measures 4.88 inches in height and features a vibrant red hue with an eye-catching iridescent finish. Perfect for indoor spaces, this decorative sculpture makes an ideal centerpiece or accent for shelves, adding a festive flair that beautifully celebrates the season of love.

Spritz™: Pops of joy that make the moment™
